problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
